title: Savory Pepper and Fermented German Crumble
description: A hearty, comforting dish blending the flavors of Germany with the crunch of crumble. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook sliced sausage over medium-high heat until browned.
Add sliced peppers and cook until tender. Set aside.
In a separate pan, cook chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add sauerkraut, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the sausage and pepper mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Top with the sauerkraut mixture and crumble.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the crumble is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
